description: Mirror-read MCP for the self-hosted Paperclip board (http://paperclip.example.test). Local SQLite cache with FTS5; auto-resolves companyId from the cached single company.
name: paperclip-pp-mcp

paperclip_agent_token.title: PAPERCLIP_AGENT_TOKEN
paperclip_agent_token.description: Optional agent bearer token for the Paperclip MCP server.

paperclip_api_key.title: PAPERCLIP_API_KEY
paperclip_api_key.description: Optional board API key for the Paperclip MCP server.

paperclip_auth_mode.title: PAPERCLIP_AUTH_MODE
paperclip_auth_mode.description: Optional explicit auth mode: board-session, board-api-key, agent-bearer, or none.

paperclip_session_cookie.title: PAPERCLIP_SESSION_COOKIE
paperclip_session_cookie.description: Optional board session cookie value for the Paperclip MCP server.
